name: twilio-voice
description: Sapphire answers real phone calls over Twilio SIP — no open ports (outbound SIP registration). Multi-account; per-number on/off via Triggers > Daemon.
author: Sapphire Trinity

event_sources.name: incoming_call
event_sources.label: Answer Phone Calls
event_sources.description: Gate: when enabled, Sapphire answers calls on the selected Twilio number and converses live. This task is an on/off switch — it does not fire a one-shot reply.

task_fields.label: Twilio number
task_fields.help: Which Twilio number this switch answers. Manage numbers in the plugin's settings.

task_fields.label: Ephemeral per-caller chat
task_fields.help: ON: each caller gets a fresh throwaway chat (📞) that auto-clears. OFF: use the saved Chat you pick in AI settings (persistent — she remembers across calls).

task_fields.label: Keep ephemeral chat for (minutes)
task_fields.help: How long a caller's throwaway chat survives after their last call. A call-back within this window resumes; after it, the chat is deleted. 0 = fresh every call.

event_sources.name: call_ended
event_sources.label: Phone Call Ended
event_sources.description: Fires after a call finishes — use to summarize the call to memory, notify you, etc.
